languages.text: "Искажение непреложных законов Империума всегда начинается с малого. Например, подобных "верований" в "духов-искусителей" без должного понимания последствий подобных речей". {n}Дознаватель холодно улыбается насторожившемуся Иждригу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Искажение непреложных законов Империума всегда начинается с малого. Например, подобных "верований" в "духов-искусителей" без должного понимания последствий подобных речей". {n}Дознаватель холодно улыбается насторожившемуся Иждригу.{/n}
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Искажение непреложных законов Империума всегда начинается с малого. Например, подобных "верований" в "духов-искусителей" без должного понимания последствий подобных речей". {n}Дознаватель холодно улыбается насторожившемуся Иждригу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with small things. Such as these 'beliefs' in 'spirits of temptation' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator offers a cold smile to the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

"The distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with small things. Such as these 'beliefs' in 'spirits of temptation' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator offers a cold smile to the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

"Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

"Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

"Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

languages.text: «La distorsión de las leyes inmutables del Imperium siempre empieza con pequeñeces, como esta creencia de "tentar a los espíritus" sin entender bien las consecuencias de esas palabras». {n}El Interrogador mira con frialdad a Izdrig, que ha adoptado un aire cauteloso.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La distorsión de las leyes inmutables del Imperium siempre empieza con pequeñeces, como esta creencia de "tentar a los espíritus" sin entender bien las consecuencias de esas palabras». {n}El Interrogador mira con frialdad a Izdrig, que ha adoptado un aire cauteloso.{/n}

languages.text: “对帝国不可撼动的律法的歪曲，总是始于微末之处，譬如这些关于‘蛊惑之灵’的信仰，却丝毫不解这般言辞所招致的后果。”{n}这位审讯官朝着如今已满心警惕的伊兹德里格冷冷一笑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “对帝国不可撼动的律法的歪曲，总是始于微末之处，譬如这些关于‘蛊惑之灵’的信仰，却丝毫不解这般言辞所招致的后果。”{n}这位审讯官朝着如今已满心警惕的伊兹德里格冷冷一笑。{/n}

languages.text: « La perversion des lois immuables de l'Impérium commence toujours par de petites choses, comme cette croyance en des « esprits tentateurs », sans que vous ne perceviez les conséquences de l'emploi de tels mots. » {n}L'interrogateur adresse un sourire froid à Izdrig, qui se tient maintenant sur ses gardes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La perversion des lois immuables de l'Impérium commence toujours par de petites choses, comme cette croyance en des « esprits tentateurs », sans que vous ne perceviez les conséquences de l'emploi de tels mots. » {n}L'interrogateur adresse un sourire froid à Izdrig, qui se tient maintenant sur ses gardes.{/n}

languages.text: "İmparatorluk'un değişmez yasalarının çarpıtılması daima küçük şeylerle başlar. Bu tür sözlerin sonuçlarını tam olarak anlamadan 'cezbedici ruhlara' olan inançlar gibi." {n}Sorgucu, şimdi daha temkinli olan İzdrig'e soğukça gülümsüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İmparatorluk'un değişmez yasalarının çarpıtılması daima küçük şeylerle başlar. Bu tür sözlerin sonuçlarını tam olarak anlamadan 'cezbedici ruhlara' olan inançlar gibi." {n}Sorgucu, şimdi daha temkinli olan İzdrig'e soğukça gülümsüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Jede Störung der unabänderlichen Gesetze des Imperiums beginnt mit Kleinigkeiten. Zum Beispiel mit dem Glauben an 'verführerische Geister', ohne die Konsequenzen solcher Worte zu verstehen." {n}Der Interrogator lächelt den mittlerweile argwöhnischen Izdrig kalt an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Jede Störung der unabänderlichen Gesetze des Imperiums beginnt mit Kleinigkeiten. Zum Beispiel mit dem Glauben an 'verführerische Geister', ohne die Konsequenzen solcher Worte zu verstehen." {n}Der Interrogator lächelt den mittlerweile argwöhnischen Izdrig kalt an.{/n}

languages.text: 「帝国の絶対的な法則が歪むのは、いつも些細なことから始まる。例えば、この『誘惑の霊』という考え。その言葉の持つ結果を理解せずに、信じていることだ。」{n}尋問官は、警戒したイズドリーグに冷たい笑みを浮かべる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Distortion of the Imperium's immutable laws always begins with the little things. Such as these beliefs in 'tempting spirits' without a proper understanding of the consequences of such words." {n}The Interrogator smiles coldly at the now-wary Izdrig.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「帝国の絶対的な法則が歪むのは、いつも些細なことから始まる。例えば、この『誘惑の霊』という考え。その言葉の持つ結果を理解せずに、信じていることだ。」{n}尋問官は、警戒したイズドリーグに冷たい笑みを浮かべる。{/n}
